home.heroTitle: All the tools you need to
home.heroSubtitle: From simple to-do lists to complex project management, PlanDaily adapts to your workflow. Explore the features that make planning effortless.
home.demoVideoNotConfigured: Demo video URL not configured. Set REACT_APP_DEMO_VIDEO_URL in .env.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of users who have transformed their chaotic days into structured success stories with PlanDaily.
home.noCreditCard: No credit card required for free plan.
home.featureRichNotesDesc: Add detailed notes and files to any task.
home.featureCollaborationDesc: Share lists and plan with family or team.
home.featureRecurringDesc: Set it once and never forget a habit again.
home.featureThemesDesc: Make your planner truly yours with colors.
home.smartSchedulingSubtitle: Stop fighting with your calendar. Our intelligent system helps you organize your time efficiently.
home.featureDragDropDesc: Rearrange your day in seconds. Move tasks between time slots or days.
home.featureAutoSyncDesc: Changes update instantly across your phone, tablet, and desktop.
home.featureSmartAlertsDesc: Get context-aware notifications that remind you when to start preparing.
home.goalBreakdownSubtitle: Big dreams can be overwhelming. PlanDaily helps you break them down into manageable daily actions.
home.goalBenefitVisualDesc: See exactly how close you are to finishing with beautiful charts.
home.goalBenefitStepsDesc: Convert abstract goals into concrete to-do items instantly.
home.goalBenefitMomentumDesc: Keep your streak alive with daily check-ins.
home.focusModeSubtitle: Distractions are the enemy of progress. Enter Focus Mode to silence the noise and get deep work done.
home.focusPomodoroDesc: Built-in timers to manage work/rest cycles.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: We value your privacy. This document outlines how we collect, use and protect your personal information when you use our daily planning service.
privacyPolicy.section1Intro: We only collect the information necessary to provide you with the best possible service. The types of information we may collect include:
privacyPolicy.section1Account: Account information: Name, email address and password when you register an account.
privacyPolicy.section1PlanData: Planning data: Goals, to‑do lists, notes and schedules you enter into the app.
privacyPolicy.section1Device: Device information: Device type, operating system and browser information to optimize the user experience.
privacyPolicy.section2Intro: Your information is used for the following purposes:
privacyPolicy.section2Item1: Provide, operate and maintain the DailyPlan application.
privacyPolicy.section2Item2: Improve, personalize and expand the features of the service.
privacyPolicy.section2Item3: Analyze how you use the app to improve the interface and user experience.
privacyPolicy.section2Item4: Send notification emails, reminders or important updates related to your account.
privacyPolicy.section3Intro: Protecting your data is our top priority. We use appropriate technical and organizational measures to safeguard your personal information against loss, theft, unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.
privacyPolicy.section3HighlightText: Your sensitive data is encrypted during transmission and storage to ensure maximum security.
privacyPolicy.section4Intro: We are committed not to sell, trade or transfer your personally identifiable information to outside parties. This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business or serving you, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.
privacyPolicy.section5Intro: You have the right to access, modify or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings. If you wish to permanently delete your data from our systems, please contact support.
privacyPolicy.section6Intro: Our website uses cookies to enhance your experience. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings, but this may affect the functionality of some features on the site.
privacyPolicy.section7Intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. You should review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacyPolicy.questionsText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our personal planning service.
termsPage.section1Body: Welcome to PlanDaily. By accessing the website and using our planning application, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our service.
termsPage.section2Intro: To use the full planning and goal tracking features, you need to register an account.
termsPage.section2Item1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password.
termsPage.section2Item2: You must provide accurate and complete information when registering.
termsPage.section2Item3: You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
termsPage.section2Item4: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if we detect a violation of these terms.
termsPage.section3Body1: The content, features and functionality of the Service (including but not limited to all information, software, text, displays, images, video and audio) are owned by PlanDaily.
termsPage.section3Body2: The personal data, plans and goals you enter into the application belong to you. We do not claim ownership of the content you create.
termsPage.section4Intro: You agree not to use the Service for any unlawful or prohibited purpose under these Terms. In particular, you agree not to:
termsPage.section4Item1: Use the Service to harass, abuse or harm others.
termsPage.section4Item2: Attempt to interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Service.
termsPage.section4Item3: Copy, resell or exploit any part of the Service without written permission.
termsPage.section5Intro: Some advanced features of the Service may require payment of fees. If you choose to subscribe to a paid plan:
termsPage.section5Item1: Fees are charged in advance according to the selected billing cycle (monthly or yearly).
termsPage.section5Item2: Subscriptions renew automatically unless you cancel before the end of the current cycle.
termsPage.section5Item3: We may change service prices, but will notify you within a reasonable period before changes take effect.
termsPage.section6Intro: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will make reasonable efforts to provide at least 30 days' notice before any new terms take effect.
